chapter_title.en: The meaning of the drinking of thirsty cattle

text: : حدثنا محمد بن أبي القاسم، عن محمد بن علي الكوفي بإسناده رفعه إلى أبي عبد الله عليه السلام أنه قيل له: الرجل يشرب بنفس واحد؟ قال: لا بأس، قلت: فإن من قبلنا يقول: ذلك شرب الهيم؟ فقال: إنما شرب الهيم ما لم يذكر اسم الله عليه.

en.basel-kadem: 1.	My father, may Allah grant him mercy, said: We were told by Muhammed bin Abi’l-Qasim, from Muhammed bin Ali al-Kufi, with a chain of narrators that he ascribed to Abu Abdillah, peace be upon him, that it was said to him: (What is the ruling of) A man who drinks in one breath? He said: There is no harm. I said: There are those before us who say that this is (like) the drinking of thirsty cattle? Then he said: The (like of the) drinking of thirsty cattle is only that which the Name of Allah has not been mentioned upon.
